name: Reception
subtitle: Shine at your wedding reception
description: The reception calls for glamour and elegance. Choose from our statement necklace sets, grand chandbalis, and contemporary designs that photograph beautifully under evening lights.
styling_tips: Go for bold statement pieces at the reception. A grand choker or long set paired with statement earrings creates a showstopping look. Keep wrist jewellery minimal if your necklace is heavy.
meta_description: Shop reception jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Statement necklaces, earrings, and sets for your wedding reception.
